initiatives.name: Burning Books
initiatives.description: A radical bookstore coordinating mutual aid and community support initiatives in Buffalo. They organize resource sharing, political education, and solidarity networks while building community power through radical literature, events, and collective organizing.

initiatives.name: SURJ Buffalo
initiatives.description: A chapter of Showing Up for Racial Justice fostering mutual aid and community solidarity through white anti-racist organizing in Buffalo. They coordinate community organizing, mobilizing, and education initiatives while building power through political education, direct action support, and creating spaces for accountable organizing in partnership with BIPOC-led organizations.

initiatives.name: Buffalo Food Not Bombs
initiatives.description: Free vegan meals for everyone, three days a week

initiatives.name: Buffalo Mutual Aid Network
initiatives.description: Buffalo Mutual Aid Network is a social action group for peer-to-peer organizing, humanitarian assistance, and reliable information sharing developed in response to the COVID-19 crisis.

initiatives.name: Black Love Resists in the Rust
initiatives.description: an intergenerational political home for Black and brown people in Buffalo, NY

initiatives.name: Workers World United Buffalo
initiatives.description: We are a Marxist-Leninist party dedicated to organizing & fighting for a socialist revolution.

initiatives.name: Progressive Book Club 716
initiatives.description: Free, in-person book club. Calling Buffalo / WNY bookworms + aspiring activists.

initiatives.name: The 716 Protests
initiatives.description: Posts protests in the area

initiatives.name: 716 Pride
initiatives.description: 716 Pride is a queer run organization dedicated to showcasing all members of the LGBTQIA Buffalo community.

initiatives.name: Queers Helping Queers Buffalo
initiatives.description: A Queer resource sharing collective based in Buffalo, NY and immediate surrounding areas. Please use the link form below to request assistance.

initiatives.name: WNY Man-Made Men
initiatives.description: Grassroots social collective for trans men and transmascs focused on building community & sharing resources

initiatives.name: Justice for Migrant Families WNY
initiatives.description: Small Western New York based community organization supporting migrants' human and civil rights.

initiatives.name: Project Homeless Connect Buffalo
initiatives.description: event held every fall to link our neighbors in need to essential services in the community.

initiatives.name: Gaza on Main
initiatives.description: Gaza on Main is a weekly protest/vigil in solidarity with Palestine.

initiatives.name: LOLA Buffalo
initiatives.description: Liberation for One, Liberation for All

initiatives.name: Buffalo Community Fridges
initiatives.description: Buffalo Community Fridge is a grassroots, 100% volunteer-led mutual aid network of community fridges dedicated to giving Buffalo communities access to fresh and healthy food.

initiatives.name: Buffalo DSA
initiatives.description: The Buffalo Local of the Democratic Socialists of America

initiatives.name: Voice Buffalo
initiatives.description: VOICE's mission is to faithfully bring forth racial justice and equity in Western New York through political education and organized collective action.

initiatives.name: Buffalo Transit Riders United
initiatives.description: Fighting for Buffalonians who ride transit and those who wish they can.

initiatives.name: Harm Reduction 716
initiatives.description: always free, always anonymous, free plan b in buffalo NY, help using less, using safer, quitting etc
